summary: Comprehensive testing of AestheticaMD patient management app completed. All 16 backend API tests pass (100%). All 19 frontend UI tests pass. Auth, Users, Dashboard, Calendar, Controls, Patients, and Audit features all working correctly.

design_issues.issue: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <tbody>/<select>/<option>. This is a development warning from React DevTools, not affecting functionality.

backend_api: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login returns token and user (200)
POST /api/auth/login - Test user login returns token and user (200)
GET /api/dashboard - Returns dashboard data with stats (200)
frontend_ui: Auth Guard: Unauthenticated access redirects to /login
Login Page: Form loads with email, password inputs and login button
Admin Login: Successful login redirects to dashboard
Dashboard: Page loads with calendar preview, upcoming surgeries, recent patients, stats
Navigation: All sidebar items present (Pulpit, Pacjenci, Planowanie, Kalendarz, Kontrole, Statystyki, Ustawienia, Użytkownicy)
Users Page: Table renders with all columns (Użytkownik, Email, Rola, Status, Ostatnie logowanie, Akcje)
Users Page: Add user button present
Users Page: Add user modal opens with form fields
Users Page: Edit user modal opens and works
Users Page: Reset password modal opens and works
Calendar Page: Grid renders with day headers (Poniedziałek-Niedziela)
Calendar Page: Month navigation buttons work
Calendar Page: Unassigned patients panel visible
Controls Page: Header 'Kontrole pooperacyjne' present
Controls Page: Stats cards (Pacjentów po operacji, Zaległych kontroli, W tym tygodniu)
Controls Page: Filter buttons (Wszyscy, Zaległe, Do wykonania)
Patients Page: List renders with search and add patient button
Patient Detail: Page loads with edit, RhinoPlanner, add visit buttons
Patient Detail: Audit log section (Historia zmian) visible
Test User Login: Works correctly, Users nav hidden for non-admin
Logout: Removes token and redirects to login

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings in console for table/select elements - cosmetic issue from development tooling, not affecting functionality
seed_data_creation: Test patient created and cleaned up during API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend APIs 100% functional. Frontend UI fully operational with Polish language. Users management (admin only), Calendar with drag-drop, Controls page with post-op tracking, Audit logs all working. Previous iteration noted RhinoPlanner canvas SVG background issue - not retested in this iteration.
